title: China’s New AI Is 6X More Efficient Than Claude
summary: Moonshot AI released Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-weight coding model designed for coding agents that work through real codebases. The model emphasizes efficiency and is positioned as competitive with closed AI coding systems.
writeup: The video covers Moonshot AI's release of Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-weight coding model built for coding agents that operate across real codebases. The emphasis is on efficiency, with the model positioned as competitive against closed coding systems. The key takeaways: it is open-weight, it targets agentic workflows rather than single-shot completions, and it is framed as a Chinese entrant challenging proprietary alternatives on coding tasks.
